hero.subheadline: Marka is a Markdown editor that gets out of your way. Real-time preview, synchronized scrolling, and a minimal interface built for deep work.
hero.footer: Free and open source · macOS · Windows · Linux

features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.subtitle: Stop fighting your tools. Marka provides a focused environment designed for the craft of writing.

items.title: Real-time Preview
items.desc: See your rendered Markdown instantly as you type, perfectly synchronized.

items.title: Minimal UI
items.desc: No sidebars, no toolbars, no distractions. Just you and your words.

items.title: Sync Scroll
items.desc: Edit and preview areas stay perfectly aligned, even with complex documents.

items.title: Flexible Themes
items.desc: Choose from curated themes like Catppuccin, or create your own custom style.

items.title: Local First
items.desc: Your data is yours. Files are stored locally in plain Markdown format.

items.title: Keyboard Driven
items.desc: Full command palette and customizable shortcuts for an efficient workflow.

editorShowcase.title: The most intuitive editing experience.
editorShowcase.subtitle: Type on the left, see the magic on the right. Synchronized perfectly for your flow.
editorShowcase.placeholder:
# Welcome to Marka

**Write** without distraction.

- Real-time preview
- Synchronized scroll
- Minimal UI

> The best editor is one you forget.

useCases.title: Built for every kind of writer.

items.title: Technical Writing
items.desc: Write documentation and blog posts with full syntax highlighting support.

items.title: Creative Work
items.desc: A clean canvas for your stories, scripts, and notes without floating menus.

items.title: Knowledge Management
items.desc: Organize your thoughts in plain Markdown files that last forever.

ctaSection.title: Ready to write better?
ctaSection.subtitle: Download Marka and experience what it feels like when your editor finally just gets out of the way.
ctaSection.footer: Free forever · Open source · No account required

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: We can't find what you're looking for. It might have moved or never existed.

download.title: Download Marka
download.subtitle: Free and open source. Available for all major operating systems. No account, no telemetry.

about.title: About Marka
about.headline: Built for the craft of writing.
about.subheadline: Marka was born from a desire for clarity. We wanted an environment where software fades into the background, leaving only you and your thoughts.
about.quote: Reduce distractions. Let writing be what it should be.
about.openSourceDesc: Marka is open source under the MIT License. We believe good software should be transparent, auditable, and community-driven.
about.footer: Made with ❤️ by the Marka team
